the Sun is in libra, the native is a 'ShauOOika'. The word in Sanskl'it has
two meal"lings, ( 1) living (earning livelihood) as a dealer in wine. and (2)
1"1 a profession connected with elephants. Here also the same argument
would apply as to how far we shall be realistic and correct if we predict
either of the above means of livelihood merety on the basis of the Sun

SUch examples can be multiplied not onty from Brihat j~t~ka but
from other Sanskrit texts also.
Many readers would feel that my article has more a negative appc"oach
than a positive one. But My difficulty is that I do not want to present a
rosy picture before the readers emphasising that the means of livelillood
can be predicted with accuracy. I remember to have read in a book
that George Ill and a blacksmith's son were born on the same date and
at the same time. 6oth were born in the same locality. Many impottant
